fabricsBacking.name: Unbleached Organic Cotton
fabricsBacking.description: Extremely slip-resistant raw textured finish keeping pads securely nested inside underwear.

fabricsBacking.name: Leakproof Breathable PUL
fabricsBacking.description: Quiet, heavy-duty liquid leak barriers that prevent spills while permitting steam to dissipate.

sizeOptions.name: Liner
sizeOptions.description: For: Daily freshness, spotting, very light days, or as backup for cups and tampons. (A simple place to begin if you’re new to reusable pads.)

sizeOptions.name: Light
sizeOptions.description: For: Light flow days, the beginning or end of your period, spotting, or everyday backup. (Comfortable, slim, and easy to wash. Perfect for lighter days.)

sizeOptions.name: Moderate
sizeOptions.description: For: Regular flow days when you need dependable everyday protection. (A balanced choice for most period days, combining comfort with reliable absorbency.)

sizeOptions.name: Heavy
sizeOptions.description: For: Heavy flow days, longer wear, or extra confidence when you need it most. (Designed with added absorbency while remaining soft, breathable, and comfortable.)

sizeOptions.name: Extra Long
sizeOptions.description: For: Overnight use, postpartum recovery, or anyone who prefers extra length and coverage. (Maximum coverage and confidence for your heaviest moments.)

absorbencyOptions.name: Standard core
absorbencyOptions.description: Sleek, low-profile and lightweight cotton core.

absorbencyOptions.name: Moderate dry
absorbencyOptions.description: Dual layer high-absorption bamboo fleece loop channels.

absorbencyOptions.name: Heavy absorbency
absorbencyOptions.description: Triple core layers plus breathable leakproof backing laminate.

absorbencyOptions.name: Super defense
absorbencyOptions.description: Four heavy-duty premium hemp-bamboo blend absorbers.

washingFaq.question: How do I prep my new cloth pad before the first use?
washingFaq.answer: Wash/soak your pad once or twice before initial wear to activate the natural bamboo & organic cotton loops' absorbency.

washingFaq.question: How do I manage the washing routine daily?
washingFaq.answer: After use, rinse in clean cold water until it runs clear (never hot as that sets pigments). Toss in laundry with normal detergent, tumble dry low or hang dry. Do NOT use softeners as they coat fibers to reduce dynamic absorbency.
